5: Tell me about the sacred treasures.

6: Tell me about the Passage of the Unbound.

8: They could be better, I confess. The thieves are still at large, and each clan has sent one of their own to track them down. One of your varied talents would be of great help, should you be willing to lend your aid.
Tell me about the sacred treasures.

9: As you well know, the treasures have all been recovered. The entirety of Tural─and the world, no doubt─is in your debt!
Tell me about the Passage of the Unbound.

10: Even so, the Passage of the Unbound consisted of six members. Although most of them have been accounted for, we can't say for sure that the threat they posed is gone for good.

11: If we catch wind of any foul plots, we'll spread word at once. Stop by once in a while and we'll share all we know─and of course, you're welcome as an honored patron any time!

They could be better, I confess. The thieves are still at large, and each clan has sent one of their own to track them down. One of your varied talents would be of great help, should you be willing to lend your aid.

12: They are objects of incredible power, passed down through generations to clans hailing from all corners of Tural.
As you well know, the treasures have all been recovered. The entirety of Tural─and the world, no doubt─is in your debt!

13: Within each is sealed the essence of an animal which became a fearsome tural vidraal, and these have come to be revered by their respective peoples.
Even so, the Passage of the Unbound consisted of six members. Although most of them have been accounted for, we can't say for sure that the threat they posed is gone for good.

14: These treasures allow their wielder to harness the power of the beast within them, and thus did the clans protect their homes.
If we catch wind of any foul plots, we'll spread word at once. Stop by once in a while and we'll share all we know─and of course, you're welcome as an honored patron any time!

15: But the origins of these relics are shrouded in mystery. None know who made them, or why. The answer to some questions has simply been lost to time, I suppose...

16: What did that Apyaahi call it, again? Oh, yes, a “secretive, villainous order,” and of that I've no doubt. The six of them sat right over there and didn't order a single thing the whole time!

17: Apyaahi seemed to be their self-styled leader, and claimed their goals were to sow discord throughout the world and make its nations crumble in the process. Stealing the treasures was only a means to this end, it seems.

18: They succeeded in their initial goal, and have since fled back across the sea. However, it would appear that each thief has retreated to a different destination.

19: The retrieval of the treasures is paramount, both to bring peace to these troubled peoples and to quell the threat of further evil!
